feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Emergence of correlation-driven altermagnetism in Hubbard model on geometrically frustrated square lattice
entry.content:
Authors: M Fahad Equbal, MAH Ahsan -arXive-prints, 2026

Abstract: We investigate the emergence of altermagnetism--a collinear magnetic phase characterized by large non-relativistic spin splitting and zero net magnetization--driven by electronic correlations on 3x3 geometrically frustrated square lattice. Using exact ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)

entry.title: Cotunneling theory and multiplet excitations: emergence of asymmetric line shape in inelastic scanning tunneling spectroscopy of correlated molecules on surfaces
entry.content:
Authors: M Lozano, M Kumar, P Jelinek, D Soler-Polo -arXivpreprintarXiv:2603.22505, 2026

Abstract: ... arXivLabs is a framework that allows collaborators to develop and share new arXiv features directly on our website. ... arXiv is committed to these values and only works with partners that adhere to them. Have an idea for a project that will add ...

Alert: arxiv" + intitle:"emergence (keyword alert)
